completed_work: Regenerated docs/self_model/SELF_MODEL.json with one completed PLAN and one proposed/open PLAN.
Updated self-model tests to include PLAN-20260706-0001.
key_decisions: The next GAP-0001 slice is context-manifest-connected diagnostics, not automatic retrieval.
Implementation must wait for a warrant/admission edge before coding.
next_actions: Create a warrant/admission edge for PLAN-20260706-0001 before implementation.
risks: The diagnostic may be misread as automatic retrieval unless labels continue to state selection_effect none and read-only behavior.
summary_text: PLAN-20260706-0001 was added as the next GAP-0001 slice after completing PLAN-20260705-0001. It proposes context-manifest-connected L0 candidate diagnostics: the diagnostic should accept or read latest-context manifest item IDs and report which valid L0 summary records match those IDs, while preserving selection_effect none. The PLAN explicitly keeps the diagnostic read-only and forbids provider prompt changes, context-pack selection changes, and automatic L0 retrieval claims. SELF_MODEL.json now reports plan_counts.completed = 1, plan_counts.proposed = 1, open_plans = [PLAN-20260706-0001], admitted_plans = [PLAN-20260705-0001], and warrant_counts.supported = 2. Post-commit audit after 5f196db returned ok true and content current.
